full_text:
This workplace has taken out statutory accident 
insurance from LocalTapiola 
The employees at this workplace are insured with occupational accident and disease insurance in accordance with 
the Employment Accidents Insurance Act. 
The insurance cover is provided by LocalTapiola General Mutual Insurance Company. 
Report accidents to the employer or manager immediately and ask for an insurance certificate. By 
presenting the insurance certificate at the clinic or pharmacy, you do not have to pay for medical 
treatment expenses or pharmaceutical expenses. 
 
Policyholder: UNIVERSITY OF HELSINKI 
Insurance contract number: 351-0926284-K 
Place of work performance, 
job or insured work: EMPLOYEES 
 
 
 
 
 
The employees have also been insured with an employees’ group life insurance. 
 
LOCALTAPIOLA GENERAL MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY 
Claims Services (Monday–Friday 8am–5pm) 
Occupational accidents, tel. 09 453 3770, LTTkorvaus@lahitapiola.fi 
Major clients, tel. 09 453 3700, tapiolaLTTsuurasiakaskorvaus@lahitapiola.fi 
lahitapiola.fi/tapaturma 
_______________________________________________________________________________ 
This notification shall be kept visible at the workplace
